system.description: No Damage. Successful attack removes two Moves and imposes -1d10 on all Physical/Combat Skills; Total Success removes three Moves.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 5: Equipment and Goods
system.qualities: No Damage. Successful attack removes two Moves and imposes -1d10 on all Physical/Combat Skills; Total Success removes three Moves.
